LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT BRETT KEATING'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THE EVIDENCE IS THAT DEFENDANT WAS PERSONALLY SERVED AND NO OTHER EXCUSE IS OFFERED FOR DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. calendar.matters:
Ntc And Mtn To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-13-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- BRETT KEATING, TEL. NO. 684-5077, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT BRETT KEATING'S MOTION To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment IS DENIED. THE EVIDENCE IS THAT DEFENDANT WAS PERSONALLY SERVED AND NO OTHER EXCUSE IS OFFERED FOR DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR# 8189 =301/PJB
